is abnormally slow breathing.[[1]](#cite_note-1) It is the opposite of [tachypnea](/wiki/Tachypnea "Tachypnea").

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | This article **needs more [reliable medical references](/wiki/Wikipedia:Identifying_reliable_sources_(medicine) "Wikipedia:Identifying reliable sources (medicine)") for [verification](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability "Wikipedia:Verifiability") or relies too heavily on [primary sources](/wiki/Wikipedia:Primary_sources "Wikipedia:Primary sources")**. Please review the contents of the article and [add the appropriate references](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Bradypnea&action=edit) if you can. Unsourced or poorly sourced material may be challenged and [removed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability#Burden_of_evidence "Wikipedia:Verifiability"). *Find sources:* ["Bradypnea"](https://www.google.com/search?as_eq=wikipedia&q=%22Bradypnea%22) – [news](https://www.google.com/search?tbm=nws&q=%22Bradypnea%22+-wikipedia&tbs=ar:1) **·** [newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22Bradypnea%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22Bradypnea%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22Bradypnea%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22Bradypnea%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(June 2024)* |

Compare [hypopnea](/wiki/Hypopnea "Hypopnea") and [hypoventilation](/wiki/Hypoventilation "Hypoventilation").

Medical condition

| Bradypnea | |
| --- | --- |
| Other names | Bradypnoea |
| Pronunciation | * [/ˌbreɪdɪpˈniːə/](/wiki/Help:IPA/English "Help:IPA/English") [*BRAY-dip-NEE-ə*](/wiki/Help:Pronunciation_respelling_key "Help:Pronunciation respelling key") |
| [Specialty](/wiki/Medical_specialty "Medical specialty") | [Pulmonology](/wiki/Pulmonology "Pulmonology") |

**Bradypnea** is abnormally slow breathing.[[1]](#cite_note-1) It is the opposite of [tachypnea](/wiki/Tachypnea "Tachypnea").

## Signs and symptoms

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bradypnea&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Signs and symptoms")]

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [icon](/wiki/File:Question_book-new.svg) | This section **does not [cite](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citing_sources "Wikipedia:Citing sources") any [sources](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability "Wikipedia:Verifiability")**. Please help [improve this section](/wiki/Special:EditPage/Bradypnea "Special:EditPage/Bradypnea") by [adding citations to reliable sources](/wiki/Help:Referencing_for_beginners "Help:Referencing for beginners"). Unsourced material may be challenged and [removed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability#Burden_of_evidence "Wikipedia:Verifiability"). *(March 2025)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

Bradypnea may occur in isolation with no other [symptoms](/wiki/Signs_and_symptoms "Signs and symptoms") or, depending on the underlying cause, be accompanied by other symptoms of breathing problems or signs of disease recognized by a medical professional.

## Causes

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bradypnea&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Causes")]

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [icon](/wiki/File:Question_book-new.svg) | This article **needs additional citations for [verification](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability "Wikipedia:Verifiability")**. Please help [improve this article](/wiki/Special:EditPage/Bradypnea "Special:EditPage/Bradypnea") by [adding citations to reliable sources](/wiki/Help:Referencing_for_beginners "Help:Referencing for beginners"). Unsourced material may be challenged and removed. *Find sources:* ["Bradypnea"](https://www.google.com/search?as_eq=wikipedia&q=%22Bradypnea%22) – [news](https://www.google.com/search?tbm=nws&q=%22Bradypnea%22+-wikipedia&tbs=ar:1) **·** [newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22Bradypnea%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22Bradypnea%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22Bradypnea%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22Bradypnea%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(March 2025)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

Abnormally slow or shallow breathing may be caused by overdoses of drugs including [opioids](/wiki/Opioid "Opioid"), [benzodiazepines](/wiki/Benzodiazepine "Benzodiazepine"), and alcohol, as well as [neuromuscular disorders](/wiki/Neuromuscular_disease "Neuromuscular disease") such as [Duchenne muscular dystrophy](/wiki/Duchenne_muscular_dystrophy "Duchenne muscular dystrophy") and [amyotrophic lateral sclerosis](/wiki/ALS "ALS"). Bradypnea may also be seen in patients with respiratory distress who are tiring from respiratory effort.

## Treatment

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bradypnea&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Treatment")]

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [icon](/wiki/File:Question_book-new.svg) | This section **does not [cite](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citing_sources "Wikipedia:Citing sources") any [sources](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability "Wikipedia:Verifiability")**. Please help [improve this section](/wiki/Special:EditPage/Bradypnea "Special:EditPage/Bradypnea") by [adding citations to reliable sources](/wiki/Help:Referencing_for_beginners "Help:Referencing for beginners"). Unsourced material may be challenged and [removed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability#Burden_of_evidence "Wikipedia:Verifiability"). *(March 2025)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

Treatment depends on the underlying medical issue causing bradypnea. [Supportive care](/wiki/Symptomatic_treatment "Symptomatic treatment") may be given, such as [supplemental oxygen](/wiki/Oxygen_therapy "Oxygen therapy") . If an [opioid overdose](/wiki/Opioid_overdose "Opioid overdose") is suspected, [naloxone](/wiki/Naloxone "Naloxone") is given and may rapidly improve the rate of breathing.

## Etymology

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bradypnea&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Etymology")]

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [icon](/wiki/File:Question_book-new.svg) | This section **does not [cite](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citing_sources "Wikipedia:Citing sources") any [sources](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability "Wikipedia:Verifiability")**. Please help [improve this section](/wiki/Special:EditPage/Bradypnea "Special:EditPage/Bradypnea") by [adding citations to reliable sources](/wiki/Help:Referencing_for_beginners "Help:Referencing for beginners"). Unsourced material may be challenged and [removed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability#Burden_of_evidence "Wikipedia:Verifiability"). *(March 2025)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

The word *bradypnea* uses [combining forms](/wiki/Classical_compound "Classical compound") of *[brady-](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/brady-#Prefix "wikt:brady-")* + *[-pnea](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/-pnea#Suffix "wikt:-pnea")*, from ([Greek](/wiki/Greek_language "Greek language") from *bradys*, slow + *pnoia*, breath).[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*]

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bradypnea&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: See also")]

* ![icon](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/d/d6/WHO_Rod.svg/20px-WHO_Rod.svg.png)[Medicine portal](/wiki/Portal:Medicine "Portal:Medicine")

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bradypnea&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: References")]

* Stegman, Julie K. (2006). Stedman, Thomas Lathrop (ed.). *Stedman's Medical Dictionary* (28th ed.). Philadelphia: Lippincott Williams & Wilkins. p. 250. [ISBN](/wiki/ISBN_(identifier) "ISBN (identifier)") [0781733901](/wiki/Special:BookSources/0781733901 "Special:BookSources/0781733901").

1. **[^](#cite_ref-1)** ["Bradypnea (Concept Id: C0231837) - MedGen - NCBI"](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/medgen/66670). *www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov*. Retrieved 2025-12-17.
